assessment.note: She names a specific gap — late stakeholder communication that erodes trust — which is a strong growth shortfall and mild clarity issue; wellbeing remains unscored despite being in signature because the answer gives no energy/capacity signal.

new_queue.label: Surprised late
new_queue.name: Stakeholders feeling 'surprised late' — what's driving that pattern from your side?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific trust-eroding pattern she named to surface the cause on her side.

new_queue.label: Signal driver
new_queue.name: What's making it harder to raise your signal with stakeholders right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether the constraint is habit, context, or channel choice.

new_queue.label: Alignment move
new_queue.name: What would better cross-team alignment look like in the next few weeks?
new_queue.description: Ends on an open, action-shaping commitment tied to friction reduction and follow-through.
